name: Ino Yamanaka
description:
__Height:__ 149.3 cm (Part I), 162.2 cm (Part II)
__Family:__ Inoichi Yamanaka (Father)
__Team:__  ~!Team Asuma Konoha 11 Team Three Nijū Shōtai Fifth Division!~

Ino Yamanaka is a childhood friend of Sakura Haruno who was bullied due to her large forehead, ending when Ino befriended her. She acted like a mentor, being tougher and more confident. Under her influence, Sakura began to develop her own identity.
